topics.title: Listener Feedback and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The show reviews listener emails regarding recent segments, including a prank call bit, a discussion of a local news story about an incompetent school principal, and various critiques of the hosts' behavior.

topics.title: Radio Industry Contract Disputes
topics.summary: The studio discusses listener feedback regarding guest appearances, a review of the film Spider-Man 3, and the legal complexities of radio contracts following Don Imus's firing.

topics.title: Legal Contracts and Superhero Comparisons
topics.summary: The studio discusses the complexities of legal contracts in the radio industry before transitioning into a debate over superhero identities and the nuances of Superman's character.

topics.title: Celebration for Jeff the Drunk
topics.summary: The studio prepares for a birthday celebration for a guest named Jeff, involving jokes about his physical appearance and plans for him to be spanked by others.

topics.title: American Idol and Celebrity Commentary
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding the contestants on American Idol, celebrity appearances by Roseanne Barr and Doug Stanhope, and plans for an upcoming sponsor lunch.

topics.title: Judge Sues Dry Cleaners Over Missing Pants
topics.summary: The studio discusses a $65 million lawsuit filed by a judge against a dry cleaning business after they lost his pants and failed to provide adequate compensation.

topics.title: Jeff the Drunk Birthday Celebration
topics.summary: The studio coordinates a birthday celebration for Jeff the Drunk involving a bikini, a pinata containing beer, and discussions regarding his public image.

topics.title: Medical Examination of a Severe Skin Condition
topics.summary: The studio hosts and guests react to a guest's severe, necrotic-looking skin infection on his buttocks while arranging for a dermatologist to provide an immediate medical evaluation.

topics.title: Medical Concerns for Jeff
topics.summary: The studio addresses concerns regarding a guest's severe skin infection and coordinates medical assistance while discussing the history of medical practices.

topics.title: Medical Careers and Physical Appearance
topics.summary: The studio discusses the perceived social advantages of being a doctor, the impact of aging on physical appearance, and various anecdotes regarding personal habits and legal issues.

topics.title: Medical Examination of a Carbuncle
topics.summary: The studio features a dermatologist who examines a guest's large boil, known as a carbuncle, and advises him to seek immediate medical treatment for the infection.

topics.title: Fox Television Negotiations and Gossip Game
topics.summary: The studio discusses potential television deals, the logistics of producing a talk show with sketches and monologues, and plays a gossip game featuring celebrity stories from Mike Walker.

topics.title: Radio Show Future and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the future of the radio show, potential retirement plans for the host, a guest appearance by comedian Doug Stanhope, and reports regarding Andre Agassi's book advance.

topics.title: Health Risks and Political Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses medical concerns regarding hepatitis B in dental offices, the physical effects of alcohol consumption on brain volume, rising costs for milk and gasoline, and current developments in the presidential race.

topics.title: News Briefings and Entertainment Updates
topics.summary: The show covers various news segments including a legal dispute over a media contract, updates on the Iraq War, child safety warnings regarding cars, an escort service lawsuit, religious developments, celebrity rumors involving Mel B and Richard Gere, international incidents involving Iran's president, and upcoming entertainment events.
